description: Configuration file for mutercim — Islamic scholarly book translation tool.

inputs.description: Input files or directories. PDFs are converted to page images via pdftoppm; image directories are used as-is. Multiple inputs are processed independently through read/solve/translate, then merged in write.

languages.description: Source language codes for this input (required). First is the primary language used for source markdown output and AI prompt configuration.

pages.description: Optional page range to process from this input (e.g. "1-50", "1,5,10-20"). If omitted, all pages are processed. Can also be set globally via the --pages CLI flag.

path.description: Path to input PDF or image directory (relative to workspace root). The filename stem becomes the subdirectory name under pages/, read/, solve/.

knowledge.description: List of knowledge YAML files and/or directories. Directories include all .yaml/.yml files. Merged with auto-extracted memory/ entries. Relative to workspace root.

output.description: Base directory for all generated output (pages/, read/, solve/, translate/, write/, log/, memory/). Relative to workspace root. Use this to keep generated files separate from the workspace.

dpi.description: DPI for PDF-to-image conversion via pdftoppm. Higher values improve OCR accuracy but increase file size and processing time. 300 is a good balance.

read.description: Read phase settings. The read phase sends page images to an AI vision model to extract structured JSON (entries, footnotes, metadata).

concurrency.description: Number of parallel page-reading workers. Currently only 1 is supported.

debug.description: When true, write annotated PNG images showing layout tool bounding boxes to read/<input>/debug/. Useful for verifying layout detection before AI processing.

layout_tool.description: Layout detection tool for precise bounding boxes. 'doclayout-yolo' uses DocLayout-YOLO (default, best for document structure). 'surya' uses Surya OCR. Both require Docker. Empty string means AI-only mode.

models.description: Ordered failover chain of AI models for OCR. The first model is primary; if it returns 429/quota errors, the next model is tried. All models must support vision for the read phase.

base_url.description: Custom API base URL. Only needed for self-hosted or non-standard OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Standard providers use built-in URLs.

model.description: Model identifier as expected by the provider's API (e.g. 'gemini-2.5-flash-lite', 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514').

provider.description: AI provider name. Determines the API endpoint and authentication method.

rpm.description: Requests per minute limit for this model. Overrides the provider default. Set to 0 to use the provider's default RPM.

rate_limit.description: Rate limiting for read-phase API calls.

requests_per_minute.description: Maximum requests per minute for read-phase API calls.

retry.description: Retry settings for failed read-phase API calls.

backoff_seconds.description: Base backoff duration in seconds. Uses exponential backoff: 2s, 4s, 8s, etc.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts per API call before marking the page as failed.

solve.description: Solve phase settings. Resolves abbreviations, injects glossary context, validates structure.

translate.description: Translation phase settings. The translate phase sends structured page data to an AI model with knowledge-enriched prompts to produce translated text.

context_window.description: Number of previous pages included in the translation prompt for continuity. Higher values give better cross-page consistency but use more tokens.

languages.description: Target language codes. Each language gets its own translate/ and write/ subdirectory. Translation runs once per target language.

models.description: Ordered failover chain of AI models for translation. Vision support is not required for translation (text-only). Non-vision models like Groq llama are valid here.

base_url.description: Custom API base URL for OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

model.description: Model identifier as expected by the provider's API.

rpm.description: Requests per minute limit for this model. Overrides the provider default.

rate_limit.description: Rate limiting for translate-phase API calls.

requests_per_minute.description: Maximum requests per minute for translate-phase API calls.

retry.description: Retry settings for failed translate-phase API calls.

backoff_seconds.description: Base backoff duration in seconds. Uses exponential backoff: 2s, 4s, 8s, etc.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts per API call before marking the page as failed.

write.description: Write phase settings. The write phase renders translated data into final output files (markdown, LaTeX, PDF, DOCX) under write/<lang>/.

expand_sources.description: When true, source abbreviations in footnotes are expanded to full names in the rendered output (e.g. 'خ' becomes 'Sahîh-i Buhârî').

formats.description: Output formats to generate. 'md' produces markdown, 'latex' produces .tex only, 'pdf' produces .tex and compiles to PDF via Docker, 'docx' converts markdown to Word via pandoc.

title: mutercim configuration
